prompt: Create a highly cinematic, low-angle photograph inside a vast, rain-streaked iron and glass structure at night. A lone figure stands on an elevated walkway holding a dim lantern. Below, a massive glowing crowd forms a dense, radiant cluster. A small, clearly visible group of individuals directly below the figure shares a similar warm glow, visually linking them to the figure. These individuals are embedded within much larger, brighter, and denser clusters of people, making it clear they are far more interconnected. No lines, no diagrams—only light, clustering, and contrast. Uncanny, atmospheric, emotionally unsettling.
visual_logic: A lone figure connects to a small group, but those individuals are embedded in much larger, denser clusters, making others appear more connected.
